texto: Dancing is spiritual. Dancing is personal. Some people look at a dancing person and say, What a total show-off. They only notice the body of the dancing person. They look at the way the elbows jut out, the way the hips shake and the neck bends. They criticize all of these things, saying, This dancing person shouldn't be dancing. This dancing person has no rhythm. But the dancer is immune to all of this.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Will Walton sobre temas ligados a fe. A afirmação “Dancing is spiritual. Dancing is personal.
